description: tool-call observability smoke: agent shell calls are recorded as action events

assertions.name: calledTool(shell)
assertions.evidence:
bash [completed]
  input: {"cmd":"cd /home/user/workspace && printf '%s
' 'niceeval-tool-call-ok' > TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt && cat TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt && npm run build","timeout_seconds":120}
  output: {"kind":"tool","message":"Tool 'bash' execution failed.","details":{"error":"RuntimeError('command exited with code 1\noutput:\nniceeval-tool-call-ok\nnpm ERR! Missing script: "build"\nnpm ERR! \nnpm ERR! To see a list of scripts, run:\nnpm ERR!   npm run\n\nnpm ERR! A complete log of this run can be found in: /home/user/.npm/_logs/2026-07-14T07_37_29_422Z-debug-0.log')"}}

  input: {"cmd":"cd /home/user/workspace && ls -la && cat package.json 2>/dev/null || true && ls -la TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt && cat TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt","timeout_seconds":120}
